comment: Bible snapshot v3. Version has no payload field - it's the loadoutHash prefix ('v3/<hash>'), supplied by the runtime. root = the character snapshot object. Fields are referenced from sheet.json by id. Intermediates factor out repeated item/core lookups.

intermediates.comment: Map of equip slot -> item (weapon, head, neck, ear1, finger1, ability_stone, bracelet, ...)

Map of equip slot (head/shoulder/upper_body/lower_body/hand/weapon) -> raid gear tier name ('Aegir'/'Serca'/''), resolved from the equipped item's id (itemBySlot) via data/armor.json's balanceLevel (1590/1675). Consumed by the *GearTier fields (E6-E11's Gear Tier section).

Ark grid processing. Per core (keyed by base): walks gems in order, marks each 'active' only if its cost (astrogems.json baseCost minus the gem's costReduc) fits the core's remaining capacity (cores.json gemSlotPoint), short-circuiting on the first that doesn't fit. Accumulates corePoints (-> activated threshold from 0/10/14/17/18/19/20) and side-node opts.level into a global `side` map (2011 ally dmg, 2012 brand, 2013 ally atk). Cores absent from cores.json (e.g. chaos cores in a partial data file) are marked found:false and yield blank points.

Ark passive nodes resolved against ark_passive.json. Exposes evolution levels by id (evo[id]) and enlightenment main/side node levels per tier (enlMain[tier], enlSide[tier]). Enlightenment tier/type come from the ref file; evolution cells are mapped by explicit id in the fields below.

DPS-only. Per-source Additional Damage contributions (each a fraction) summed by dpsAddDmgTotal into the DPS tab's C20 cell: weapon (computed weapon stat id 10144000 /10000), Master evolution node 1032200 (8.5% when allocated), ark-grid side lines (sum of side-line levels x 0.0008086), the 'Stable Attack' ark-grid core (threshold+grade schedule), bracelet additional damage (auto: sum of the bracelet's 'Additional Damage' special-effect lines via data/add_dmg_bracelet.json, e.g. 11041->3.5%, plus any raw skill_damage_rate roll at index 50, value/10000), and the stronghold farm select (dpsStronghold). Reads $.itemBySlot/$.arkPassive/$.arkGrid + inputs; support fields never reference it.

Spec (F14) / Swiftness (F15) totals = snapshot evolution points (x50) + advanced-input roster/pet bonuses. The log previews the resolved pet/points in phase 1 (specPoints/swiftPoints); this is the authoritative value written in phase 2 with the confirmed inputs.

Per-engraving activation level on the ability stone. An engraving activates one level at each of [6,7,9,10] nodes, so level = count of thresholds met (0-4): <6->0, 6->1, 7/8->2, 9->3, 10->4. Consumed by awakeningRock (BC24) and stoneBonus (F19). [] when no stone.

Map of skill id -> { dmg, cdr } gem LEVELS. Walks the player's equipped gems (root.gems): a gem effect of type 5 is a skill-damage gem, type 27 a skill-cooldown gem, both keyed by the skill id the effect targets; the level comes from ref.gems[gem.id].level. Consumed by the ap1/ap2/brand gem fields (BB/BC 3-5).

The player class's ap1 / ap2 / brand skill (from skills.json by classId+type), each {id, cooldown (base ms), effectiveCooldown (ms after taken cooldown tripods), ...} or null. The snapshot's root.classId is the lowercase class NAME ('bard'), while skills.json keys on the numeric classId, so NAME2ID maps the 4 support classes (paladin 105 / valkyrie 113 / bard 204 / artist 602); a numeric classId passes through unchanged. Every support class has exactly one ap1 and one ap2; a class may DESIGNATE several 'brand' skills. `brands` lists every brand skill DETECTED in the build (level > 0 in root.skills, most-leveled first) and `brand` is the primary - the first of `brands` (highest level, ties -> skills.json order: deterministic but arbitrary when multiple are run). With no brand slotted, brands is empty and brand falls back to the class's highest-defined brand. effectiveCooldown applies each skills.json cdrTripod (reduce_default_cooldown reference: {tier, option, cd-delta-ms}) whose option matches the player's chosen tripod for that tier (root.skills[*].tripods is [tier1,tier2,tier3] option indices); cd is signed (negative reduces, positive trade-off tripods increase). Consumed by the ap1/ap2/brand cooldown + gem fields (rows 3-5).

The player's other GEMMED skills (BB6:BD10), driven by the equipped gems (root.gems via skillGems), NOT the skill loadout: every skill carrying a damage (effect type 5) or cooldown (type 27) gem, in gem-equip order, minus the 3 already placed as ap1/ap2/brand (by id - only the primary brand is excluded, so a second brand skill flows through here). Each resolved to {id, cooldown (effectiveCooldown ms, same cdrTripod logic as classSkills; base cooldown when the skill isn't in the loadout so tripods are unknown), dmg, cdr gem levels from skillGems}. The skillN fields below read indices 0-4; fewer than 5 -> trailing rows blank, more than 5 -> extras ignored. Paladin special case: paladins can slot a cooldown gem on their IDENTITY (gem effect type 35 targeting skill group 15001, the Piety skills; see raw_data/GemSkillGroup.json). The sheet has no identity-cooldown slot, so its level is simply parked in the first available (empty) damage-gem slot among these rows so it still counts toward the gem-level total.

fields.comment: Class string e.g. 'bard'
Gear Tier E6: raid tier of the equipped headpiece ('Aegir'/'Serca'/''). See gearTier intermediate.
Gear Tier E7: raid tier of the equipped shoulderpiece.
Gear Tier E8: raid tier of the equipped chestpiece.
Gear Tier E9: raid tier of the equipped pants.
Gear Tier E10: raid tier of the equipped gloves.
Gear Tier E11: raid tier of the equipped weapon.
Specialization total (F14). See combatStats intermediate.
Swiftness total (F15). See combatStats intermediate.
Main-stat % from avatar skins (F18). Advanced-input percentage (0-8) -> fraction; cell is percent-formatted. Replaces the old loadout-based detection (now skinBonusFromLoadout).
Main-stat % from stronghold farm bonus (BJ3). Advanced-input percentage -> fraction; cell is percent-formatted.

F19: sum of activated engraving levels on the ability stone (see stoneEngravings; penalty engravings 800-803 excluded). Canonical number; the sheet transform maps >=5 -> '9/7 and better', else 'worse than 9/7'. '' when no stone.
F21: raw karma evolution level. The sheet transform converts it to a rank via the breakpoint table [0,1,5,9,13,17,21].
Total ally-damage (opt 2011) side-node levels across all ACTIVE astrogems
Total brand-power (opt 2012) side-node levels across all ACTIVE astrogems
Total ally-attack (opt 2013) side-node levels across all ACTIVE astrogems
Raw core id in the Order Sun slot (base 10001)
Activated core threshold (0/10/14/17/18/19/20) for the Order Sun core
Enlightenment tier 1 main node level (AM6)
Enlightenment tier 2 main node level (AM7)
Enlightenment tier 3 main node level (AM8)
Enlightenment tier 4 main node level (AM9)
Enlightenment tier 3 side node level (AM12)
Enlightenment tier 4 side node level (AM13)
Evolution node Luminary 1032400 (AM17)
Evolution node Advance 1032500 (AM18)
Evolution node Prayer 1032600 (AM19)
Evolution node Boundless MP 1020100 (AM23)
Evolution node Goddess of Blessings 1020600 (AM24)
Evolution node Unlimited Magick 1030100 (AM29)
Evolution node Passionate Dance 1030600 (AM30)

Raw necklace stat-line objects. Canonical - the sheet (AU3-5 via expr/statLineText.ts) drops the fixed base stats (base:true), keeps the rolled lines in order, and renders each via data/stat_lines.json.
Necklace main stat value (index 4, equal across the 3/4/5 main-stat slots) -> AU6
Raw earring-1 stat lines (AU9-11, ordered, base stats dropped). See neckStats.
Raw earring-2 stat lines (AW9-11).
Raw ring-1 stat lines (AU15-17).
Raw ring-2 stat lines (AW15-17).
Bracelet main stat (index 11, all main-stat types) -> AU24

Raw, unfiltered bracelet stat-line objects ({index,value,...}). Canonical - the sheet decides which lines render and how: the AU25-28 cells share expr/statLineText.ts, which keeps only stats present in data/stat_lines.json, renders them to text, and uses each cell's transformArg (0-3) to pick the Nth rendered line (so they pack contiguously regardless of which raw stats lack text).
Crit dmg tier 1(high)-3(low)

BB21: Magick Stream engraving grade/level. Found in root.engravings by id 1251 (Ability.json engrave id 251 + 1000 offset used by the character engraving list). Canonical token: engrave_grade05 = full relic -> 20; engrave_grade04 = relic -> floor(progress/5)*5 (5/10/15); a relic level below 5, or any lower grade -> 'legendary'. The sheet renders 'Relic N' / 'Legendary'. '' when the engraving isn't slotted.

BB24: Awakening engraving grade/level. Found in root.engravings by id 1255 (Ability.json engrave id 255 + 1000). NB: the ability-STONE engraving list uses the un-offset id 255 (see awakeningRock/stoneEngravings) - different list, different convention. Same grade/level token as magickStreamBooks (relic level <5 or sub-relic -> 'legendary').
BC24: activation level (0-4) of the awakening engraving (id 255) on the ability stone (see stoneEngravings). Canonical number; the sheet transform renders 'Stone Lv. N'. '' when no stone.
Leap CDR: class's 'Release Potential' node level, resolved per class (Bard 2215400 / Paladin 2365400 / Valkyrie 2485400 / Artist 2315400). See expr/leapCdrCommon.ts.
Leap CDR artist-only 'Dragon Gem' node 2315600 (0 for non-artist)
BD3: cooldown (ms, raw from skills.json) of the class's ap1 skill.

B11: level (1-10) of the identity-damage gem - the equipped gem (root.gems) carrying an effect of type 65 (identity damage), e.g. the support's Doomfire gem. Level comes from ref.gems[gem.id].level; '' when no such gem is slotted. Unlike skillGems (type 5/27, keyed by target skill), the identity gem is not tied to a skill, so it's resolved directly here.

BD11: default (base) cooldown (ms, raw from skills.json) of the class's T skill - a fixed skill id per class (Bard Aria 21300 / Paladin Divine Justice 36260 / Valkyrie Divine Confirmation 48510 / Artist Dragon Engraving 31950). No tripod reduction is applied (default cooldown). The sheet converts ms->seconds via the BD11 transform.
BB3: skill-damage gem level (type 5) on the class's ap1 skill; '' when no damage gem is slotted on it.
BC3: skill-cooldown gem level (type 27) on the class's ap1 skill; '' when none.
BD4: cooldown (ms) of the class's ap2 skill.
BB4: skill-damage gem level on the class's ap2 skill.
BC4: skill-cooldown gem level on the class's ap2 skill.
BB17: the ap1 AP-buff skill's level (from the snapshot's root.skills).
BB18: the ap2 AP-buff skill's level (from the snapshot's root.skills).
BD5: cooldown (ms) of the class's (single, build-selected) brand skill.
BB5: skill-damage gem level on the class's brand skill.
BC5: skill-cooldown gem level on the class's brand skill.
BB6: skill-damage gem level on the player's 1st other equipped skill (non ap1/ap2/brand).
BC6: skill-cooldown gem level on that skill.
BD6: effective cooldown (ms, after taken cooldown tripods) of that skill.
BB7: skill-damage gem level on the player's 2nd other equipped skill (non ap1/ap2/brand).
BC7: skill-cooldown gem level on that skill.
BD7: effective cooldown (ms, after taken cooldown tripods) of that skill.
BB8: skill-damage gem level on the player's 3rd other equipped skill (non ap1/ap2/brand).
BC8: skill-cooldown gem level on that skill.
BD8: effective cooldown (ms, after taken cooldown tripods) of that skill.
BB9: skill-damage gem level on the player's 4th other equipped skill (non ap1/ap2/brand).
BC9: skill-cooldown gem level on that skill.
BD9: effective cooldown (ms, after taken cooldown tripods) of that skill.
BB10: skill-damage gem level on the player's 5th other equipped skill (non ap1/ap2/brand).
BC10: skill-cooldown gem level on that skill.
BD10: effective cooldown (ms, after taken cooldown tripods) of that skill.

Source for the DPS tab's gem block (H3:I11), bound as character='dps'. Every gemmed skill as {dmg,cdr} gem-level pairs in gem-equip order, covering BOTH single-skill gems (effect type 5/27) AND skill-GROUP gems (type 34/35 -> raw_data/GemSkillGroup.json via ref.gem_skill_groups): DPS skills are mostly gemmed by group, so type 5/27 alone misses most of them. Nothing is excluded (a support-class DPS still lists ap1/ap2/brand). The sheet's expr/gemLevel.ts transform picks [row].dmg or .cdr per cell. See expr/dpsGems.ts.
DPS tab C20 (character='dps', percent). Additive sum (a fraction) of the DPS's Additional Damage sources from addDamageParts.
Debug/part: weapon-quality additional damage (computed weapon stat id 10144000 /10000).
Debug/part: Master evolution node (1032200) additional damage (0.085 when allocated).
Debug/part: ark-grid side-line additional damage (sum of side-line levels x 0.0008086).
Debug/part: 'Stable Attack' ark-grid core additional damage (threshold + grade schedule).
Debug/part: bracelet additional damage (auto: special-effect ability ids via data/add_dmg_bracelet.json + raw skill_damage_rate rolls at index 50, summed).
Debug/part: stronghold farm additional damage (manual select dpsStronghold /100).
